dashboard.label: ZKSplunk Overview
dashboard.description: Midnight component health from public infrastructure metadata. Contents are private; ZKSplunk observes metadata and volumes only.

html.div: Privacy boundary: ZKSplunk monitors public proof-server, indexer, node, and contract metadata. It does not observe private Midnight state, witness arguments, shielded parties, or shielded amounts. — Open the MCP/chat analyst →

panel.title: Current Component Health (latest per component, last 15m)

search.query: index=zksplunk (sourcetype="midnight:vitals" OR sourcetype="zksplunk:connector" OR sourcetype="midnight:contracts") earliest=-15m | eval response_time_ms=if(isnull(response_time_ms),"-",response_time_ms) | stats latest(status) as status latest(severity) as severity latest(response_time_ms) as response_time_ms latest(message) as message latest(_time) as last_update by component | eval last_update=strftime(last_update,"%H:%M:%S") | table component status severity response_time_ms last_update message | sort component
index=zksplunk sourcetype="midnight:vitals" type="midnight.vital.check" earliest=-15m | stats latest(status) as status by component | where status="critical" | stats count as critical
index=zksplunk sourcetype="midnight:vitals" component="proof-server" type="midnight.vital.check" response_time_ms=* earliest=-15m | stats perc95(response_time_ms) as p95
index=zksplunk sourcetype="midnight:chain" type="midnight.chain.block_latest" block_height=* earliest=-30m | stats latest(block_height) as block_height
index=zksplunk sourcetype="zksplunk:connector" type="zksplunk.connector.status" earliest=-15m | stats max(failed_events_since_last_heartbeat) as failed | eval failed=coalesce(failed,0)

panel.title: Proof server latency (avg / p95) — red bar = outage

search.query: index=zksplunk sourcetype="midnight:vitals" component="proof-server" type="midnight.vital.check" earliest=-30m | timechart span=1m avg(response_time_ms) as avg_latency_ms perc95(response_time_ms) as p95_latency_ms count(eval(status="critical")) as critical_count | eventstats max(p95_latency_ms) as _scale | eval outage=if(critical_count>0, round(coalesce(_scale, 100)*1.1), null()) | fields - critical_count _scale

panel.title: Indexer latency (avg / p95) — red bar = outage

search.query: index=zksplunk sourcetype="midnight:vitals" component="indexer" type="midnight.vital.check" earliest=-30m | timechart span=1m avg(response_time_ms) as avg_latency_ms perc95(response_time_ms) as p95_latency_ms count(eval(status="critical")) as critical_count | eventstats max(p95_latency_ms) as _scale | eval outage=if(critical_count>0, round(coalesce(_scale, 100)*1.1), null()) | fields - critical_count _scale

index=zksplunk sourcetype="zksplunk:connector" type="zksplunk.connector.status" earliest=-15m | stats latest(_time) as last_seen latest(total_events_sent) as total_events_sent latest(total_events_failed) as total_events_failed latest(failed_events_since_last_heartbeat) as failed_events_since_last_heartbeat latest(queued_events) as queued_events latest(average_latency_ms) as average_latency_ms latest(scheduler_active) as scheduler_active | eval seconds_since_heartbeat=round(now()-last_seen) | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%H:%M:%S") | table last_seen seconds_since_heartbeat total_events_sent total_events_failed failed_events_since_last_heartbeat queued_events average_latency_ms scheduler_active

index=zksplunk earliest=-15m | where status="critical" OR severity="critical" OR send_status="failed" | eval t=strftime(_time,"%H:%M:%S") | table t component type status severity response_time_ms message error_message | sort -t
